history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Hi there! What would you like today? We have Our World Famous Fries.

history.speaker: client
history.text: I'm lactose intolerant and pretty hungry. Do you have any main item recommendations?

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Since you're lactose intolerant, we have Chicken McNuggets as a main item that doesn't contain lactose. They do contain gluten, but that's safe for your needs. Would you like to order those?

history.speaker: client
history.text: Yes, I'll take the Chicken McNuggets. Do you have the Our World Famous Fries?

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Your Chicken McNuggets are confirmed. We do have Our World Famous Fries available. Would you like to add those to your order?

history.speaker: client
history.text: Yes, I'll add the Our World Famous Fries. That'll make it a hearty meal for me.

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Got it! Your order is Chicken McNuggets and Our World Famous Fries. Is that correct?

history.speaker: client
history.text: Yes, that's correct. I don't need anything else.

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Your order is confirmed: Chicken McNuggets and Our World Famous Fries. Ready for pickup!

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: You're welcome! Have a great day.

I'm lactose intolerant and pretty hungry. Do you have any main item recommendations?
Since you're lactose intolerant, we have Chicken McNuggets as a main item that doesn't contain lactose. They do contain gluten, but that's safe for your needs. Would you like to order those?
Yes, I'll take the Chicken McNuggets. Do you have the Our World Famous Fries?
Your Chicken McNuggets are confirmed. We do have Our World Famous Fries available. Would you like to add those to your order?
Yes, I'll add the Our World Famous Fries. That'll make it a hearty meal for me.
Got it! Your order is Chicken McNuggets and Our World Famous Fries. Is that correct?
Yes, that's correct. I don't need anything else.
Your order is confirmed: Chicken McNuggets and Our World Famous Fries. Ready for pickup!
Thanks, I'll be right there.
